title: MaterialsForTheArts
description: An annual, category-level summary of donations to Materials for the Arts (MFTA) — DCLA's creative-reuse program that redistributes donated goods to arts nonprofits, public schools, and City agencies. Canonical schema reconciling 'DCLA Materials For The Arts - Donor Information' (vhtt-kpwy, 6 columns). Aggregate by Year + Category; no individual donor is exposed.

category.description: Donation category ('Category', e.g. Office Supplies, Fabric, Furniture).

totalDeclaredValue.description: Total declared value in dollars ('Total Declared Value ($)').

totalWeightShortTons.description: Total weight in short tons ('Total Weight (Short Tons)').
